overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a robed character exploring a gothic wizard dormitory with blue curtains and wooden bunk beds. The character navigates through arched doorways, climbs stone staircases with floating candles, passes suits of armor, and traverses hallways before reaching a large window overlooking the exterior.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic dormitory with bunk beds and blue curtains

events.description: character opens wooden door and exits dormitory into hallway

agents.ego_description: walking through the dormitory room toward the exit door, passing wooden cabinets and a white dresser

entered.detail: wooden four-poster beds with blue draped curtains and white bedding
heavy blue fabric drapes hanging from bed posts and windows
antique white wooden dresser with drawers and potted plant on top
dark wood tall storage cabinets against the stone wall
three brooms mounted on wall rack beside the arched doorway

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a sunlit gothic dormitory with wooden bunk beds draped in blue curtains. The character walks past a white dresser and tall wooden cabinets toward an arched doorway, where three brooms hang on the wall, before opening the door to exit into a dim hallway.

events.description: entering dimly lit stone hallway from bright dormitory
opening door at top of stairs to re-enter dormitory

agents.ego_description: climbing the wooden staircase with stone walls, passing framed portraits on the wall

entered.detail: steep wooden stairs with stone block walls and wooden handrail
gold-framed oil paintings hanging on the stairwell wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a dimly lit stone hallway and ascends a narrow wooden staircase. Gold-framed portraits line the stone walls as the character climbs toward a door at the top, transitioning from the dark stairwell back into the dormitory.

agents.ego_description: walking around the dormitory interior, observing the beds, posters on walls, and a white owl perched on the bedpost

entered.detail: wooden bunk beds with blue curtains viewed from the opposite entrance
colorful quidditch posters and notices pinned to the stone wall
white snowy owl perched on the wooden bedpost
circular patterned rug on the wooden floor

segments.scene_description: Back in the dormitory through a different entrance, the character explores the circular room with wooden bunk beds and blue curtains. Sunlight streams through gothic windows, illuminating posters on the walls and a white owl perched on a bedpost as the character walks across the round rug toward another exit.

events.description: reaching the grand staircase with floating candles and high ceilings
passing suit of armor at the top of the grand staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the grand wooden staircase with ornate railings, passing floating candles and a stationary suit of armor

entered.detail: wide wooden staircase with elaborate carved railings ascending into misty heights
candles suspended in mid-air providing warm illumination
full plate armor standing on display at the stair landing

segments.scene_description: The character exits the dormitory and ascends a magnificent grand staircase with ornate wooden railings. Floating candles hover in the air providing warm light against the cool stone walls. At the landing, a full suit of armor stands guard as the character continues climbing higher before reaching a hallway door.

events.description: re-entering the dormitory through an upper level door

agents.ego_description: walking through the dormitory again, passing a wall mirror and various beds before heading toward another exit

entered.detail: wooden bunk beds with blue curtains seen from the upper entrance
rectangular mirror with white frame mounted on the stone wall
decorative plaque with number 7 mounted between two doors

segments.scene_description: The character re-enters the dormitory through a door at the top of the stairs, revealing the familiar blue-curtained bunk beds from a new angle. A wall mirror reflects the room as the character walks past a door marked with number 7, heading toward another exit.

events.description: approaching large arched window with bright exterior view

agents.ego_description: walking through a bright hallway past a notice board, approaching a large window overlooking the outside

entered.detail: wooden bulletin board with papers and notices pinned to it
tall gothic arched window with diamond panes showing bright exterior

segments.scene_description: The character exits the dormitory into a brightly lit hallway with a wooden notice board on the wall. Walking toward a large arched window at the end of the corridor, the scene opens to a view of the exterior with flying creatures visible through the diamond-paned glass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a gothic wizarding dormitory and its surrounding corridors, transitioning from intimate living quarters to a grand architectural vista. It begins in a sunlit room filled with blue-curtained bunk beds and wooden cabinets, moving through an arched doorway into a dim stone hallway where the camera ascends a narrow staircase lined with gold-framed portraits. The scene then loops back into the circular dormitory, passing a white owl on a bedpost and a round rug before exiting once more to climb a magnificent grand staircase illuminated by floating candles and guarded by a suit of armor. After a brief return to the dormitory to pass a mirrored wall and a door marked with number 7, the camera pushes forward into a brightly lit hallway featuring a wooden notice board. Finally, the movement culminates at a large arched window, where the interior stone walls give way to a view of flying creatures through diamond-paned glass.
